verdict.rationale: The claim's 13.053 matches the regional review's 'Qualified commercial pipeline' (Q2 2026 actual), but the finance pack's final restatement (approved 15 July 2026, authority rank 1) states 13.510 for 'Qualified pipeline' in the same Q2 2026 period. The regional review explicitly states its pipeline 'uses local CRM qualification and is not ranked against Finance,' i.e. a different qualification basis that the documents themselves declare non-comparable — so no authority ordering resolves the two competing values.
verdict.suggested_action: Determine which pipeline definition the master document intended (regional CRM-qualified vs. finance-qualified) and restate the claim against the finance pack's 13.510 if the group-wide finance figure is the intended metric.

evidence.span_text: Regional pipeline uses local CRM qualification and is not ranked against Finance.
